document.source_title: Trump claims planned attack on Iran postponed after Tehran makes new proposal to end war

claims.claim_text: Trump postponed a planned military attack on Iran.
claims.evidence_text: Trump said he had been asked by the leaders of several Gulf countries to 'hold off on our planned Military attack [on Iran], which was scheduled for tomorrow.'

claims.claim_text: Iran has made a new proposal to end the war.
claims.evidence_text: Iran has made a new proposal for a deal to definitively end the war in the Middle East, officials in the region said on Monday.

entities.name: Iran
entities.description: Iran is involved in ongoing negotiations to end the war.
entities.evidence_text: Iran has made a new proposal for a deal to definitively end the war in the Middle East.

entities.name: United States
entities.description: The US is involved in negotiations and military actions regarding Iran.
entities.evidence_text: Trump said he had instructed military leaders that 'we will NOT be doing the scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow.'

entities.name: Pakistan
entities.description: Pakistan has been mediating between the US and Iran.
entities.evidence_text: Baghaei claimed Pakistan has shared Tehran’s latest proposal with the US.

entities.name: Saudi Arabia
entities.description: Saudi Arabia is one of the Gulf countries involved in the negotiations.
entities.evidence_text: Trump claimed that the leaders of Qatar, the United Arab Emirates and Saudi Arabia had approached Washington.

entities.name: United Arab Emirates
entities.description: The UAE has been affected by drone strikes from Iran.
entities.evidence_text: One drone strike caused a fire at a nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates.

events.event: Trump postpones military attack on Iran
events.evidence_text: Trump said he had been asked by the leaders of several Gulf countries to 'hold off on our planned Military attack [on Iran].'
A 45-day ceasefire extension between Lebanon and Israel is now in effect after a third round of US-hosted talks.

metrics.name: arrests in Iran
metrics.evidence_text: HRANA said it had documented at least 4,023 arrests in Iran between 28 February and 9 May.

metrics.name: fatalities due to US-Israeli attacks
metrics.evidence_text: HRANA said it had documented at least 3,636 fatalities, including 1,701 civilians, due to US-Israeli attacks on Iran in the war.

metrics.name: executions of political prisoners
metrics.evidence_text: Rights groups have said that since the start of the war, Iran has executed 26 men seen as 'political prisoners.'

citations.title: Trump claims planned attack on Iran postponed after Tehran makes new proposal to end war

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news organization, but the information includes unverified claims.
